HGSS.590.0000:
Thank you for shopping with us today.\f
To which floor may I take you? [0200,0000]
HGSS.590.0001: I look forward to serving you again.
HGSS.590.0004: We are already on that floor?!
HGSS.590.0005:
First floor has the Service Counter
and the main entrance.
HGSS.590.0006:
Second floor has the Trainer’s Market,
where various useful items are sold.
HGSS.590.0007:
Third floor has the Battle Collection
to aim for strong, tough Pokémon.
HGSS.590.0008:
Fourth floor has the Medicine Box to
improve your Pokémon’s potential.
HGSS.590.0009:
Fifth floor has the TM Corner
to give your Pokémon a new edge.
HGSS.590.0010:
Sixth floor has the Rooftop Atrium.
Don’t miss the Daily Drawing Corner!
HGSS.590.0011:
The basement has the warehouse.
It is not open to customers.
